creator: nc@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm trying to figure out why net-p2p/arbitrum-avm is failing to build, and I found a dependency databases/rocksdb fails on poudriere bulk.

On poudriere testport, it builds fine.

Log (from poudriere bulk):

install -C -m 644 rocksdb.pc /wrkdirs/usr/ports/databases/rocksdb/work/stage/usr/local/lib/pkgconfig/rocksdb.pc
install -d /wrkdirs/usr/ports/databases/rocksdb/work/stage/usr/local/lib
install -C -m 755 librocksdb.a /wrkdirs/usr/ports/databases/rocksdb/work/stage/usr/local/lib
[ -e librocksdb.so.6.27.3 ] && gmake install-shared || :
gmake[1]: Leaving directory '/wrkdirs/usr/ports/databases/rocksdb/work/rocksdb-6.27.3'
/bin/mkdir -p /wrkdirs/usr/ports/databases/rocksdb/work/stage/usr/local/share/rocksdb/
cd /wrkdirs/usr/ports/databases/rocksdb/work/rocksdb-6.27.3/ && install  -s -m 555 cache_bench db_bench memtablerep_bench persistent_cache_bench range_del_aggregator_bench table_reader_bench blob_dump db_repl_stress db_sanity_test db_stress ldb rocksdb_dump rocksdb_undump sst_dump trace_analyzer write_stress /wrkdirs/usr/ports/databases/rocksdb/work/stage/usr/local/bin/
install  -m 0644 /wrkdirs/usr/ports/databases/rocksdb/work/rocksdb-6.27.3/librocksdb_tools.so /wrkdirs/usr/ports/databases/rocksdb/work/stage/usr/local/lib/
/usr/bin/strip /wrkdirs/usr/ports/databases/rocksdb/work/stage/usr/local/lib/librocksdb.so /wrkdirs/usr/ports/databases/rocksdb/work/stage/usr/local/lib/librocksdb_tools.so
strip: open /wrkdirs/usr/ports/databases/rocksdb/work/stage/usr/local/lib/librocksdb.so failed: No such file or directory
*** Error code 1
